case_title: ALEXANDER PEGUES,JR. VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,CA PUBLIC ENTITY et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 6, 2008 TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN OPPOSITION AND TO BE HEARD ON THE MERITS. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 22, 2008. REPLY TO BE FILED ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 29, 2008. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ALEXANDER PEGUES, TEL. NO. (310) 367-0393, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED AT 10:00 A.M. AND COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT IN COURT DESPITE HEARING IS REQUIRED. JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTION WAS MADE. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. CLAIM IS DENIED, SUIT WAS NOT FILED WITHIN 6 MONTHS. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =301/PJB
